profile.notLoggedIn: Please log in to view your profile.

hero.title: Where Little Hands Shape the Future of Fashion
hero.subtitle: Every child's imagination, woven into sustainable threads. Every purchase, a step toward a fairer world.

featured.body1: Each campaign begins in a classroom, a community center, a shelter. We collect children's artwork — raw, honest, unfiltered — and transform it into sustainable fashion that funds their future.
featured.body2: Every garment in this collection begins the same way — with a child, a blank page, and the freedom to imagine. We partner with schools and community centres across twelve cities, running workshops where children draw their hopes for the world.
featured.body3: Our designers then translate these raw, honest artworks into patterns, prints, and embroideries — never altering the child's original vision. The result is clothing that carries real stories, not manufactured ones.
featured.heading: Where Little Hands Shape Big Ideas

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.description: Whether you donate, shop, or share our story — every action counts.

quote.body: Every stitch carries a child's dream. Every garment is a chapter in a story that hasn't been written yet.
quote.author: Chen Wei

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A publication born from the belief that every child deserves to see their creativity change the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Tonghua Public Welfare bridges the raw, unfiltered imagination of children with the world of sustainable fashion. We believe that the most honest art comes from the youngest hands — and that fashion can be a force for good when it carries those stories forward.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.body: Every thread traced. Every donation accounted for. We publish our supply chain because you deserve to know.

childFirst.title: Child-First Design
childFirst.body: Children are collaborators, not subjects. Their consent, privacy, and creative ownership are non-negotiable.

sustainability.title: Genuine Sustainability
sustainability.body: No greenwashing. We measure carbon footprints, use certified materials, and publish our environmental impact quarterly.

community.title: Community Roots
community.body: We work with local schools, shelters, and community centers. Fashion is the medium; community is the message.

team.title: The People Behind the Pages
team.subtitle: A small team with an oversized purpose.

workshop.caption: A Saturday workshop in Shanghai — where it all begins

quote.body: We don't just sell clothes. We sell the right to say: I know where this came from, and it came from somewhere good.
quote.author: Li Mei

hero.title: Campaigns
hero.subtitle: Each campaign is a chapter — a focused effort to connect children's art with sustainable fashion that funds real change.

listing.sectionSubtitle: Browse our ongoing, upcoming, and completed initiatives.

hero.title: Donate
hero.subtitle: Your generosity funds art supplies, workshops, sustainable materials, and the infrastructure that turns children's dreams into wearable stories.

emotional.quote: Before this program, I did not know my drawings could matter. Now I know they can change the world.
emotional.author: Mei Lin

impact.title: Where Your Money Goes
impact.artSuppliesDesc: Paints, brushes, canvases, and skilled workshop facilitators.
impact.productionDesc: Certified organic fabrics, fair-wage tailors, eco-dyes.
impact.operationsDesc: Website, payment processing, child safety systems.

transparency.title: Financial Transparency
transparency.subtitle: We publish quarterly financial reports. Every yuan is accounted for.
transparency.quarterly: Quarterly reports published every January, April, July, October
transparency.quote: Transparency is not a feature. It is a responsibility.

cta.title: Every yuan tells a story. What will yours say?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your donation directly funds art supplies, workshops, and sustainable materials for children. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly how every yuan is spent.
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous. Your privacy is important to us, and we respect your choice.
faq.a3: Yes, all donations to Tonghua Public Welfare are tax-deductible. You will receive an official receipt for your records.
faq.q4: How can I track my donation impact?
faq.a4: You will receive updates on how your donation is making a difference. We also publish quarterly financial reports showing the impact of all donations.

hero.subtitle: Every garment carries a child's story. Every purchase funds the next chapter.

shop.notifyMeSuccess: We will let you know when this is back.

sustainability.materialsDesc: All fabrics are GOTS-certified organic cotton or recycled polyester.
sustainability.productionDesc: Fair wages, safe conditions, full supply chain transparency.
sustainability.carbonDesc: Every product's carbon footprint is calculated and offset.

behind.title: Behind the Collection
behind.caption: A Saturday morning workshop in Chengdu, where children paint the dreams that will become our next collection.
behind.body1: Every garment in this collection begins the same way — with a child, a blank page, and the freedom to imagine. We partner with schools and community centres across twelve cities, running workshops where children draw their hopes for the world.
behind.body2: Our designers then translate these raw, honest artworks into patterns, prints, and embroideries — never altering the child's original vision. The result is clothing that carries real stories, not manufactured ones.
behind.quote: I drew the ocean because I want it to stay blue forever.

hero.title: Traceability
hero.subtitle: From the child's hand that drew the design to the artisan who stitched it — follow every step of the journey.

traceability.subtitle: Full Journey
traceability.journeySubtitle: A verifiable, step-by-step record from raw material to finished garment.

lookup.title: Trace Your Product
lookup.subtitle: Enter an order number or product ID to follow its complete journey from creation to delivery.
lookup.placeholder: Enter order number or product ID...

carbon.title: Carbon Footprint Comparison
carbon.subtitle: Our commitment to sustainability means measuring, reducing, and offsetting every gram of emissions.
carbon.reductionDesc: Lower emissions through organic materials, consolidated shipping, and verified carbon offsets.
carbon.explanation: Based on lifecycle analysis comparing conventional fast-fashion production with our certified supply chain. Includes raw material sourcing, manufacturing, quality control, and last-mile delivery.

certifications.title: Certifications and Standards
certifications.subtitle: Every claim we make is backed by independent third-party verification.

howItWorks.title: How Traceability Works
howItWorks.recordDesc: Every step in the supply chain is documented with photos, dates, locations, and partner verification.
howItWorks.verifyDesc: Third-party auditors verify each record. Unverified steps are flagged transparently.
howItWorks.publishDesc: The complete journey is published on our platform for every customer to inspect.

traceability.quote: If you can trace it, you can trust it. Every stitch tells a story worth knowing.

cta.label: Shop with Confidence
cta.headline: Know what you wear. Trust what you buy.
cta.body: Every garment in our collection comes with a complete, verifiable supply chain record. No hidden steps, no unverified claims.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We read every message. Whether you have a question, a partnership idea, or a story to share — we're listening.
hero.welcome: Whether you want to donate, collaborate, or just say hello — we'd love to hear from you.

items.question: How can I make a donation?
items.answer: You can donate through our secure online platform, WeChat Pay, or bank transfer. Every contribution directly supports children's art programs and sustainable fashion initiatives.

items.question: How do I submit my child's artwork?
items.answer: Visit our Campaigns page to find active art drives. You can upload artwork directly through our platform or send it to us via email. All submissions are reviewed within 3 business days.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also check your order status anytime through your account dashboard under My Orders.

items.question: Are there volunteer opportunities?
items.answer: Yes. We welcome volunteers for workshops, event coordination, translation, and digital outreach. Send us a message with your interests and availability, and we will match you with the right opportunity.

items.question: How can my organization partner with you?
items.answer: We partner with schools, NGOs, and businesses that share our values. Select Partnership as your subject below and tell us about your organization. Our team will respond within 48 hours.
